instruction:
Let the joint probability density function of the two-dimensional continuous random variable (X,Y) be f(x,y) = 24(1-x)y, where 0<y<x<1, find E(X|y), 0<y<1

Options:
A. 2y/3 + 1/6
B. y/4 + 1/2
C. 2y/3 + 1/4
D. 2y/3+1
E. 3y/4+1/4
F. y/3 + 1/2
G. y/3+1/3
H. 2y/3 + 1/3
I. y/3 + 1/4
J. y/3 + 1/6
